theory.canonical_statement: ID 471 defines the protocol for injecting entangled states from the Mediator Channel into biological tissue. By utilizing direction sensitive sensors within the vestibular and proprioceptive systems, the DAANSsphere axis provides a vector stimulus that the brain perceives as an internal coordinate shift. This creates a shared reference frame where the mind and reactor occupy the same topological manifold. Vector Coupling: Uses axis alignment to change the directional projection of forces and stimuli within neural oscillators. Basis Rotation: Translates reactor mode components into the user's local physiological frame using Wigner D matrices. Polarization Locking: Entrains biological systems to follow a moving mode identity (chi, ) without changing eigenfrequencies.
